style.image_style: clean Korean serialized webtoon panel, crisp black line art, clean cel shading, medium-shot friendly composition, expressive readable face, natural proportions, simple everyday Korean interior or street background, character occupies 35-60 percent of frame height, clear foreground silhouette, polished webtoon illustration

sfx.category_guide: This is a warm Korean daily-life webtoon video. Use subtle SFX only when they improve the scene. Available tags: rain, night, door, footsteps, whoosh, notification, sad, happy, crying, impact. Avoid horror jumpscare unless the story is explicitly mystery or thriller.

forced_style.force_positive: clean Korean serialized webtoon panel, crisp black line art, clean cel shading, medium-shot friendly composition, expressive readable face, natural proportions, simple everyday Korean interior or street background, character occupies 35-60 percent of frame height, clear foreground silhouette, polished webtoon illustration
forced_style.force_negative: photorealistic, 3d render, generic anime screenshot, chibi, super deformed, doll face, tiny person, far away character, distorted line art, glitch, over-sharpened, noisy edges, extra limbs, extra fingers, cropped head, cut off hair, messy overlays, floating UI card, readable text, random letters, signage text, watermark, logo, gore, nsfw

thumbnail.style_guide: 웹툰 표지처럼 캐릭터 표정과 한 줄 상황으로 끌어당긴다. 과장된 사기/막장 문구 대신 생활 속 이상함, 관계 변화, 작은 반전을 강조한다.
